41: func (p *SwarmProvider) SetDefaults() {
42: 	p.Watch = true
43: 	p.ExposedByDefault = true
44: 	p.Endpoint = "unix:///var/run/docker.sock"
45: 	p.RefreshSeconds = ptypes.Duration(15 * time.Second)
46: 	p.DefaultRule = DefaultTemplateRule
47: }

60: func (p *SwarmProvider) createClient(ctx context.Context) (*client.Client, error) {
61: 	p.ClientConfig.apiVersion = SwarmAPIVersion
62: 	return createClient(ctx, p.ClientConfig)
63: }

65: // Provide allows the docker provider to provide configurations to traefik using the given configuration channel.
66: func (p *SwarmProvider) Provide(configurationChan chan<- dynamic.Message, pool *safe.Pool) error {
67: 	pool.GoCtx(func(routineCtx context.Context) {
68: 		logger := log.Ctx(routineCtx).With().Str(logs.ProviderName, swarmName).Logger()
69: 		ctxLog := logger.WithContext(routineCtx)
70: 
71: 		operation := func() error {
72: 			var err error
73: 			ctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(ctxLog)
74: 			defer cancel()
75: 
76: 			ctx = log.Ctx(ctx).With().Str(logs.ProviderName, swarmName).Logger().WithContext(ctx)
77: 
78: 			dockerClient, err := p.createClient(ctx)
79: 			if err != nil {
80: 				logger.Error().Err(err).Msg("Failed to create Docker API client")
81: 				return err
82: 			}
83: 			defer func() { _ = dockerClient.Close() }()
84: 
85: 			builder := NewDynConfBuilder(p.Shared, dockerClient)
86: 
87: 			serverVersion, err := dockerClient.ServerVersion(ctx)
88: 			if err != nil {
89: 				logger.Error().Err(err).Msg("Failed to retrieve information of the docker client and server host")
90: 				return err
91: 			}
92: 
93: 			logger.Debug().Msgf("Provider connection established with docker %s (API %s)", serverVersion.Version, serverVersion.APIVersion)
94: 
95: 			dockerDataList, err := p.listServices(ctx, dockerClient)
96: 			if err != nil {
97: 				logger.Error().Err(err).Msg("Failed to list services for docker swarm mode")
98: 				return err
99: 			}
100: 
101: 			configuration := builder.build(ctxLog, dockerDataList)
102: 			configurationChan <- dynamic.Message{
103: 				ProviderName:  swarmName,
104: 				Configuration: configuration,
105: 			}
106: 			if p.Watch {
107: 				errChan := make(chan error)
108: 
109: 				// TODO: This need to be change. Linked to Swarm events docker/docker#23827
110: 				ticker := time.NewTicker(time.Duration(p.RefreshSeconds))
111: 
112: 				pool.GoCtx(func(ctx context.Context) {
113: 					logger := log.Ctx(ctx).With().Str(logs.ProviderName, swarmName).Logger()
114: 					ctx = logger.WithContext(ctx)
115: 
116: 					defer close(errChan)
117: 					for {
118: 						select {
119: 						case <-ticker.C:
120: 							services, err := p.listServices(ctx, dockerClient)
121: 							if err != nil {
122: 								logger.Error().Err(err).Msg("Failed to list services for docker swarm mode")
123: 								errChan <- err
124: 								return
125: 							}
126: 
127: 							configuration := builder.build(ctx, services)
128: 							if configuration != nil {
129: 								configurationChan <- dynamic.Message{
130: 									ProviderName:  swarmName,
131: 									Configuration: configuration,
132: 								}
133: 							}
134: 
135: 						case <-ctx.Done():
136: 							ticker.Stop()
137: 							return
138: 						}
139: 					}
140: 				})
141: 				if err, ok := <-errChan; ok {
142: 					return err
143: 				}
144: 				// channel closed
145: 			}
146: 			return nil
147: 		}
148: 
149: 		notify := func(err error, time time.Duration) {
150: 			logger.Error().Err(err).Msgf("Provider error, retrying in %s", time)
151: 		}
152: 		err := backoff.RetryNotify(safe.OperationWithRecover(operation), backoff.WithContext(job.NewBackOff(backoff.NewExponentialBackOff()), ctxLog), notify)
153: 		if err != nil {
154: 			logger.Error().Err(err).Msg("Cannot retrieve data")
155: 		}
156: 	})
157: 
158: 	return nil
159: }

161: func (p *SwarmProvider) listServices(ctx context.Context, dockerClient client.APIClient) ([]dockerData, error) {
162: 	logger := log.Ctx(ctx)
163: 
164: 	serviceList, err := dockerClient.ServiceList(ctx, dockertypes.ServiceListOptions{})
165: 	if err != nil {
166: 		return nil, err
167: 	}
168: 
169: 	serverVersion, err := dockerClient.ServerVersion(ctx)
170: 	if err != nil {
171: 		return nil, err
172: 	}
173: 
174: 	networkListArgs := filters.NewArgs()
175: 	// https://docs.docker.com/engine/api/v1.29/#tag/Network (Docker 17.06)
176: 	if versions.GreaterThanOrEqualTo(serverVersion.APIVersion, "1.29") {
177: 		networkListArgs.Add("scope", "swarm")
178: 	} else {
179: 		networkListArgs.Add("driver", "overlay")
180: 	}
181: 
182: 	networkList, err := dockerClient.NetworkList(ctx, dockertypes.NetworkListOptions{Filters: networkListArgs})
183: 	if err != nil {
184: 		logger.Debug().Err(err).Msg("Failed to network inspect on client for docker")
185: 		return nil, err
186: 	}
187: 
188: 	networkMap := make(map[string]*dockertypes.NetworkResource)
189: 	for _, network := range networkList {
190: 		networkMap[network.ID] = &network
191: 	}
192: 
193: 	var dockerDataList []dockerData
194: 	var dockerDataListTasks []dockerData
195: 
196: 	for _, service := range serviceList {
197: 		dData, err := p.parseService(ctx, service, networkMap)
198: 		if err != nil {
199: 			logger.Error().Err(err).Msgf("Skip container %s", getServiceName(dData))
200: 			continue
201: 		}
202: 
203: 		if dData.ExtraConf.Docker.LBSwarm {
204: 			if len(dData.NetworkSettings.Networks) > 0 {
205: 				dockerDataList = append(dockerDataList, dData)
206: 			}
207: 		} else {
208: 			isGlobalSvc := service.Spec.Mode.Global != nil
209: 			dockerDataListTasks, err = listTasks(ctx, dockerClient, service.ID, dData, networkMap, isGlobalSvc)
210: 			if err != nil {
211: 				logger.Warn().Err(err).Send()
212: 			} else {
213: 				dockerDataList = append(dockerDataList, dockerDataListTasks...)
214: 			}
215: 		}
216: 	}
217: 
218: 	return dockerDataList, err
219: }
220: 
221: func (p *SwarmProvider) parseService(ctx context.Context, service swarmtypes.Service, networkMap map[string]*dockertypes.NetworkResource) (dockerData, error) {
222: 	logger := log.Ctx(ctx)
223: 
224: 	dData := dockerData{
225: 		ID:              service.ID,
226: 		ServiceName:     service.Spec.Annotations.Name,
227: 		Name:            service.Spec.Annotations.Name,
228: 		Labels:          service.Spec.Annotations.Labels,
229: 		NetworkSettings: networkSettings{},
230: 	}
231: 
232: 	extraConf, err := p.extractLabels(dData)
233: 	if err != nil {
234: 		return dockerData{}, err
235: 	}
236: 	dData.ExtraConf = extraConf
237: 
238: 	if service.Spec.EndpointSpec != nil {
239: 		if service.Spec.EndpointSpec.Mode == swarmtypes.ResolutionModeDNSRR {
240: 			if dData.ExtraConf.Docker.LBSwarm {
241: 				logger.Warn().Msgf("Ignored %s endpoint-mode not supported, service name: %s. Fallback to Traefik load balancing", swarmtypes.ResolutionModeDNSRR, service.Spec.Annotations.Name)
242: 			}
243: 		} else if service.Spec.EndpointSpec.Mode == swarmtypes.ResolutionModeVIP {
244: 			dData.NetworkSettings.Networks = make(map[string]*networkData)
245: 			for _, virtualIP := range service.Endpoint.VirtualIPs {
246: 				networkService := networkMap[virtualIP.NetworkID]
247: 				if networkService != nil {
248: 					if len(virtualIP.Addr) > 0 {
249: 						ip, _, _ := net.ParseCIDR(virtualIP.Addr)
250: 						network := &networkData{
251: 							Name: networkService.Name,
252: 							ID:   virtualIP.NetworkID,
253: 							Addr: ip.String(),
254: 						}
255: 						dData.NetworkSettings.Networks[network.Name] = network
256: 					} else {
257: 						logger.Debug().Msgf("No virtual IPs found in network %s", virtualIP.NetworkID)
258: 					}
259: 				} else {
260: 					logger.Debug().Msgf("Network not found, id: %s", virtualIP.NetworkID)
261: 				}
262: 			}
263: 		}
264: 	}
265: 	return dData, nil
266: }
267: 
268: func listTasks(ctx context.Context, dockerClient client.APIClient, serviceID string,
269: 	serviceDockerData dockerData, networkMap map[string]*dockertypes.NetworkResource, isGlobalSvc bool,
270: ) ([]dockerData, error) {
271: 	serviceIDFilter := filters.NewArgs()
272: 	serviceIDFilter.Add("service", serviceID)
273: 	serviceIDFilter.Add("desired-state", "running")
274: 
275: 	taskList, err := dockerClient.TaskList(ctx, dockertypes.TaskListOptions{Filters: serviceIDFilter})
276: 	if err != nil {
277: 		return nil, err
278: 	}
279: 
280: 	var dockerDataList []dockerData
281: 	for _, task := range taskList {
282: 		if task.Status.State != swarmtypes.TaskStateRunning {
283: 			continue
284: 		}
285: 		dData := parseTasks(ctx, task, serviceDockerData, networkMap, isGlobalSvc)
286: 		if len(dData.NetworkSettings.Networks) > 0 {
287: 			dockerDataList = append(dockerDataList, dData)
288: 		}
289: 	}
290: 	return dockerDataList, err
291: }
292: 
293: func parseTasks(ctx context.Context, task swarmtypes.Task, serviceDockerData dockerData,
294: 	networkMap map[string]*dockertypes.NetworkResource, isGlobalSvc bool,
295: ) dockerData {
296: 	dData := dockerData{
297: 		ID:              task.ID,
298: 		ServiceName:     serviceDockerData.Name,
299: 		Name:            serviceDockerData.Name + "." + strconv.Itoa(task.Slot),
300: 		Labels:          serviceDockerData.Labels,
301: 		ExtraConf:       serviceDockerData.ExtraConf,
302: 		NetworkSettings: networkSettings{},
303: 	}
304: 
305: 	if isGlobalSvc {
306: 		dData.Name = serviceDockerData.Name + "." + task.ID
307: 	}
308: 
309: 	if task.NetworksAttachments != nil {
310: 		dData.NetworkSettings.Networks = make(map[string]*networkData)
311: 		for _, virtualIP := range task.NetworksAttachments {
312: 			if networkService, present := networkMap[virtualIP.Network.ID]; present {
313: 				if len(virtualIP.Addresses) > 0 {
314: 					// Not sure about this next loop - when would a task have multiple IP's for the same network?
315: 					for _, addr := range virtualIP.Addresses {
316: 						ip, _, _ := net.ParseCIDR(addr)
317: 						network := &networkData{
318: 							ID:   virtualIP.Network.ID,
319: 							Name: networkService.Name,
320: 							Addr: ip.String(),
321: 						}
322: 						dData.NetworkSettings.Networks[network.Name] = network
323: 					}
324: 				} else {
325: 					log.Ctx(ctx).Debug().Msgf("No IP addresses found for network %s", virtualIP.Network.ID)
326: 				}
327: 			}
328: 		}
329: 	}
330: 	return dData
331: }

112: 					logger.Debug().Msgf("Provider event received %+v", m)
113: 					containers, err := p.listContainers(ctx, dockerClient)
114: 					if err != nil {
115: 						logger.Error().Err(err).Msg("Failed to list containers for docker")
116: 						// Call cancel to get out of the monitor
117: 						return
118: 					}
119: 
120: 					configuration := builder.build(ctx, containers)
121: 					if configuration != nil {
122: 						message := dynamic.Message{
123: 							ProviderName:  dockerName,
124: 							Configuration: configuration,
125: 						}
126: 						select {
127: 						case configurationChan <- message:
128: 						case <-ctx.Done():
129: 						}
130: 					}
131: 				}
132: 
133: 				eventsc, errc := dockerClient.Events(ctx, options)
134: 				for {
135: 					select {
136: 					case event := <-eventsc:
137: 						if event.Action == "start" ||
138: 							event.Action == "die" ||
139: 							strings.HasPrefix(string(event.Action), "health_status") {
140: 							startStopHandle(event)
141: 						}
142: 					case err := <-errc:
143: 						if errors.Is(err, io.EOF) {
144: 							logger.Debug().Msg("Provider event stream closed")
145: 						}
146: 						return err
147: 					case <-ctx.Done():
148: 						return nil
149: 					}
150: 				}
151: 			}
152: 
153: 			return nil
154: 		}
155: 
156: 		notify := func(err error, time time.Duration) {
157: 			logger.Error().Err(err).Msgf("Provider error, retrying in %s", time)
158: 		}
159: 		err := backoff.RetryNotify(safe.OperationWithRecover(operation), backoff.WithContext(job.NewBackOff(backoff.NewExponentialBackOff()), ctxLog), notify)
160: 		if err != nil {
161: 			logger.Error().Err(err).Msg("Cannot retrieve data")
162: 		}
163: 	})
164: 
165: 	return nil
166: }
167: 
168: func (p *Provider) listContainers(ctx context.Context, dockerClient client.ContainerAPIClient) ([]dockerData, error) {
169: 	containerList, err := dockerClient.ContainerList(ctx, container.ListOptions{})
170: 	if err != nil {
171: 		return nil, err
172: 	}
173: 
174: 	var inspectedContainers []dockerData
175: 	// get inspect containers
176: 	for _, c := range containerList {
177: 		dData := inspectContainers(ctx, dockerClient, c.ID)
178: 		if len(dData.Name) == 0 {
179: 			continue
180: 		}
181: 
182: 		extraConf, err := p.extractLabels(dData)
183: 		if err != nil {
184: 			log.Ctx(ctx).Error().Err(err).Msgf("Skip container %s", getServiceName(dData))
185: 			continue
186: 		}
187: 
188: 		dData.ExtraConf = extraConf
189: 
190: 		inspectedContainers = append(inspectedContainers, dData)
191: 	}
192: 
193: 	return inspectedContainers, nil
194: }
